title: Waiting in Line at a Restaurant 餐厅排队
scene: Tom和Lily在餐厅门口排队等位。

lines.en: Wow, there are so many people here!
We need to wait. Let me get a number.
lines.zh: 我们需要等一下。我去拿个号。

lines.en: They are calling number fifteen now.
So we have about eight groups ahead of us.
lines.zh: 所以我们前面大概还有8桌。

lines.en: That might take a while. I am getting hungry.
lines.zh: 可能要等一会儿。我饿了。

lines.en: Here, have a snack while we wait.
lines.zh: 来，我们等的时候先吃点零食。

lines.en: Thank you. How long do you think we will wait?
lines.zh: 谢谢。你觉得我们要等多久？

lines.en: Maybe twenty minutes. Let me check the app.
lines.zh: 大概二十分钟。让我看看手机。
